persona.name: Sasha Goodner
persona.bio: Sasha Goodner is a costume technician trained at the University of North Carolina School of the Arts. She has built costumes at Bethany Joy Costumes in New York for The Great Gatsby (Korea) and San Francisco Opera, draped eight productions at UNCSA, and worked summer stock at Ohio Light Opera.

images.title: Sasha Goodner
images.description: Sasha Goodner, draper and costume technician

tags.value: If Pretty Hurts, then Ugly Must Be a Muhfucka

categories.name: Theatre Work
categories.description: Costume construction for professional theatre productions.

categoryContent.headline: Theatre Work
categoryContent.introduction: Costume construction for professional theatre productions.

projects.title: The Great Gatsby — Korea
projects.description: Costume construction for The Great Gatsby, Korea production (OD Company). Costume designer: Linda Cho. Associate: Patrick Bevilacqua. Hand finishing on garments across multiple characters.

projects.title: Dalibor — Bard Summerscape
projects.description: Judges’ robes for Dalibor at Bard Summerscape. Costume designer: Alain Blainchot. Assembled panels, blind hemmed arm holes and pleat tops, hand finishing.

projects.title: La Bohème — Santa Fe Opera
projects.description: Costume construction for La Bohème at Santa Fe Opera 2025. Costume designer: Constance Hoffman. Draper: Sarah Moench. Hand finishing on garments.

projectDetails.venue: Bethany Joy Costumes / Santa Fe Opera

projects.title: The Marriage of Figaro — Santa Fe Opera
projects.description: Costume construction for The Marriage of Figaro at Santa Fe Opera 2025. Costume designer: Laurent Pelly. Draper: Sarah Moench. Hand finishing on garments.

projectDetails.venue: Bethany Joy Costumes / Santa Fe Opera

projects.title: Austen’s Pride — Stages St. Louis
projects.description: Lady Catherine for Austen’s Pride at Stages St. Louis. Costume designer: Emily Rebholz. Draper: Rebecca Eckes. Pleated and attached the collar to the base collar.

projectDetails.venue: Bethany Joy Costumes / Stages St. Louis

projects.title: Broadway Documentary — Norwegian Cruise Line
projects.description: Complete final dress for Broadway Documentary on Norwegian Cruise Line. Costume designer: Elivia Bovenzi. Draper: Rebecca Eckes. Marrowed edges and gathered ruffles.

projects.title: Guys and Dolls — Ohio Light Opera
projects.description: Alterations on various characters for Guys and Dolls at Ohio Light Opera’s 2024 summer season. Designer: Jen Gillette. Photos by Matt Dilyard.

projectDetails.venue: Ohio Light Opera, College of Wooster

projects.title: Sound of Music — Ohio Light Opera
projects.description: Von Trapp Children alterations for Sound of Music at Ohio Light Opera. Designer: Bill Brewer.

projectDetails.venue: Ohio Light Opera, College of Wooster

categories.name: UNCSA Productions
categories.description: Draping and stitching work across productions at the University of North Carolina School of the Arts.

categoryContent.headline: UNCSA Productions
categoryContent.introduction: Draping and stitching work across productions at the University of North Carolina School of the Arts.

projects.title: The Impresario — Buff
projects.description: Waistcoat and breeches for Buff. Designer: Nikki Harada. First hand: Madison Anysz. Made basic blocks and adapted pants to fall-front breeches. Vest and coat trim hand-sewn.

projects.title: The Great Comet of 1812 — Sonya
projects.description: Dress for Sonya. Designer: Avery McLintock Smith. First hand: Madison Anysz. Bodice, skirt, and sleeve patterning.

projects.title: UNCSA Stock — 17th Century Stays
projects.description: Patterned the corset using a draft from Stays and Corsets Volume 2. Fashion fabric fused onto broadcloth with Wonder Under and flatlined to coutil. Boning channels sewn, corset assembled.

projects.title: UNCSA Stock — Cartridge Pleated Skirt
projects.description: Cartridge pleated skirt for UNCSA stock.

photos.title: Cartridge Pleated Skirt Back Close Up
Cartridge Pleated Skirt Side Close Up

projects.title: Die Fledermaus — Rosalinde
projects.description: Overcoat for Rosalinde. Designer: Gabi Hertel. First hands: Natalie Juran, Nikki Harada. Worked with another draper. Adapted corrected block to open overcoat, fully lined with waist seam. Made belt and sleeve trim.

projects.title: Wild Party — Eddie
projects.description: Pants and vest for Eddie. Designer: Inga Domenick. First hand: Natalie Juran. Patterned pants and vest, corrected patterns, cut fashion fabrics. Zip fly and pockets for fitting, vest shell constructed for second fitting.

projects.title: Fairview — Suze
projects.description: Alterations on church suit for Suze. Designer: Aman Mundle. First hand: Natalie Juran. Suit bought 2-3 sizes too large. Everything taken in, arm sleeves changed, shoulder pads removed, new zippers.

projects.title: The Rover — Wilmore
projects.description: Doublet, breeches and cape for Wilmore. Designer: William Wharton. Draper: Audrey Pugh. Cut and sewed mock-up. For final, flatlined fabric, bag-lined, sewed together. Body slashes made of bias-cut strips.

projects.title: Twelfth Night — Viola
projects.description: Jacket for Viola. Designer: Reagan Whiteley. Draper: Audrey Pugh. Cut and sewed mock-up. Helped finish jacket interior and applied prick-stitching to pockets.

projects.title: Dangerous Corner — Freda Caplan
projects.description: Dress for Freda Caplan. Designer: Sarah McElcheran. Draper: Molly Klem. Worked as stitcher on mockup and final. Did a lot of hand stitching including hem of skirt.

projects.title: If Pretty Hurts — Chorus
projects.description: Jacket for Chorus. Designer: Marquita Horton. Draper: Quincy D'Allessio. Worked on ease pleats and sequin preparation and sewing.

projectDetails.production: If Pretty Hurts, then Ugly Must Be a Muhfucka

tags.value: If Pretty Hurts, then Ugly Must Be a Muhfucka

projects.title: Mother Courage — Various Characters
projects.description: Alterations for multiple men in the show. Designer: Zoe Gilreath. Draper: Molly Klem. Took in pants, replaced zippers and buttons, added suspender buttons.

projects.title: Orlando Paladino — Various Characters
projects.description: Patches on suits, pleated belt, chiffon strips for river souls. Some strips cut on bias, others on straight grain. Designer: Logan Benson. Draper: Ella Moffly.

categoryContent.headline: Finished Garments
categoryContent.introduction: Completed garments from tailoring and costume technology coursework at UNCSA.

projects.title: Coat
projects.description: Tailored coat with pad-stitched lapels. Draper and stitcher.

projects.title: 1911 Corset
projects.description: 1911-style corset construction. Draper and stitcher.

projects.title: Garment Recreation
projects.description: Recreation of an existing garment through pattern analysis. Draper and stitcher.

projects.title: Shirt Waist
projects.description: Shirt waist construction. Draper and stitcher.

projects.title: Breeches and Vest
projects.description: Period breeches and vest construction. Draper and stitcher.

projects.title: Boned Bodice
projects.description: Boned bodice with period construction techniques. Draper and stitcher.

categories.name: Draping & Patterning
categories.description: Speed draping exercises, half-scale reproductions, and patterning coursework at UNCSA.

categoryContent.headline: Draping & Patterning
categoryContent.introduction: Speed draping exercises, half-scale reproductions, and patterning coursework at UNCSA.

projects.title: Holiday Dress
projects.description: Speed drape based on a rendering from a colleague. Padded form for exaggerated silhouette.

projects.title: Robe à la Française
projects.description: Three-hour speed drape from reference image.

projects.title: Bustle Dress 1885
projects.description: Three-hour speed drape. Full bustle rather than the typical half.

projects.title: Afternoon Dress 1895
projects.description: Speed drape with multiple reference images. Included overlay on the bodice.

projects.title: Balenciaga Coat 1963
projects.description: Three-hour speed drape of half an image. No back reference, so it was left to interpretation.

projects.title: Spencer Jacket (Speed Drape)
projects.description: Speed draping exercise. Spencer jacket with construction detail work.

projects.title: Striped Blouse (Half Scale)
projects.description: Half-scale striped blouse from reference through mockup to finished miniature.

photos.title: Striped Blouse Mock Up Close Up

projects.title: Renaissance Sleeve (Half Scale)
projects.description: Half-scale renaissance sleeve mockup.

projects.title: Pointed Sleeve (Half Scale)
projects.description: Half-scale pointed sleeve blouse mockup.

photos.title: Pointy Sleeve Blouse Pattern With Sleeves
Pointy Sleeve Blouse Sleeve Close Up

categories.name: Personal Work
categories.description: Independent garment projects outside of production and coursework.

categoryContent.headline: Personal Work
categoryContent.introduction: Independent garment projects outside of production and coursework.

projects.title: Malon (Renfaire Version)
projects.description: Corseted garment with chemise, petticoat, and embroidered sleeves. Tucks thread-traced and stitched. Skirt design cut with Cricut, embroidery files created in Inkstitch.

projects.title: Embroidered Boned Bodice
projects.description: Patterned by classmate Francesca Schnalke. Embroidery files designed and created. Coutil and flannel layers with boning channels. Fashion fabric embroidered, flatlined on curve. Tabs and peplum bagged out.

projects.title: Princess Peach Dress (Mario)
projects.description: Princess seam bodice with three layers: matte satin, flannel on bias, coutil with plastic boning. Ruffle foot gathered skirt. Polyfill in sleeves for full look.

projects.title: April O’Neil (TMNT)
projects.description: Jumpsuit based on a free Mood pattern. Pants flatlined for opacity and color vibrancy.

projects.title: Mew Ichigo (Tokyo Mew Mew)
projects.description: Three circle skirts with layered gathered tulle. PVC pipe tail on backplate with belt loops, covered in fur fabric.

projects.title: Astronaut Barbie (1980s)
projects.description: Leg of mutton sleeves with tulle support layers. Quilted silver vest with piping. Back lap zipper. Front design cut with Cricut.

projects.title: Bay City Rollers Overalls
projects.description: Skirt version of performance pants inspired by the Bay City Rollers. Pattern-matching across tartan was the main challenge.

categories.name: Millinery
categories.description: Hat construction for coursework and productions.

categoryContent.headline: Millinery
categoryContent.introduction: Hat construction for coursework and productions.

projects.title: Pillbox Hat
projects.description: First millinery project. Learned basics of hat patterning and construction.

projects.title: Pulled Hat
projects.description: Pulled wool hat based on 1970s reference photos. Crown is sized.

projects.title: Elliot — A Soldier’s Fugue
projects.description: Helmet for Elliot. Designer: Ollie Gretok. Crafts Head: Reagan Whiteley. Re-covered helmet in different fabric from original pull. New cover fitted and constructed.

projects.title: Lyubov Ranevskaya — The Cherry Orchard
projects.description: Hat for Lyubov Ranevskaya. Designer: Inga Domenick. Crafts Head: Reagan Whiteley. Built from designer’s reference image.

photos.title: Hat Before Restoration Inside Close Up
